title: osascript as Export Tool
html:
Stub. The exact incantation Yahir used to dump every Apple Notes title in May 2025:

osascript -e 'tell application "Notes" to get the name of every note'

This is the manual precursor to the eventual Exporter + iPhone Shortcut pipeline that now feeds raw/apple-notes/. Useful breadcrumb for understanding how the second-brain workflow was bootstrapped. First mentioned in 2025 05 04 apple notes osascript titles dump.

related.label: macOS Automation pane — Terminal + Windsurf accessibility grants
osascript Apple Notes title dump — May 4 2025 (visual capture)
